raw_consumer_statement: I used my Wyndham Rewards Visa to make two purchases for online reservations and had used it another time before these charges but I did not make more than {$350.00} ( U.S. currency ) value of charges with this card and I paid off the balance within XXXX months. Since that time sometime last fall XXXX or XX/XX/year>, the company in charge of issuing credit, Barclays, of Delaware claims I have not made a payment and that there is a different balance on my credit account than XXXX.
